subject: [Platform] Update CMPv2 templates and config
commit_message:
[Platform] Update CMPv2 templates and config

Adjust CMPv2 templates to use certificates from
CertManager in communication between CertService
and its clients

Issue-ID: OOM-2712
Signed-off-by: Remigiusz Janeczek <remigiusz.janeczek@nokia.com>
Change-Id: I7c2f205933b8b82453266c1564bc9db644863327
